objections.description: Motion system specification is incomplete - document cuts off mid-media-query at '--duration-fast: 0ms' in prefers-reduced-motion block. Cannot approve partial spec.
objections.suggested_fix: Complete the animations.css section with full prefers-reduced-motion overrides, animation keyframes for screen transitions (fade-in, slide-up, slide-down), component animations, and explicit will-change cleanup instructions via animationend handler.

objections.description: Color contrast matrix shows --text-tertiary fails AA on bg-elevated (dark: 3.8:1) and bg-tertiary (light: 3.9:1). Spec says 'NOT used' but provides no enforcement mechanism. This will cause accessibility violations in production.
objections.suggested_fix: Add CSS custom property aliases that physically prevent misuse: create --text-tertiary-safe that maps to --text-secondary on problematic backgrounds, or add linting rules to design-token-check.js that fail CI if tertiary text appears on elevated surfaces.

objections.description: Focus ring double-ring technique uses --color-bg-primary as inner ring, but this fails when component sits on non-primary backgrounds (e.g., card on bg-secondary). The 2px inner ring won't provide guaranteed contrast separation.
objections.suggested_fix: Change focus ring to use surface-aware approach: inner ring should be dynamically calculated or use a neutral color that contrasts with both light and dark surfaces. Consider: inner ring = white in dark theme, black in light theme, both at 2px, with outer ring = --color-focus-ring-solid at 2px.

objections.description: Elevation tokens only define box-shadow but dark mode elevated surfaces need border treatment for proper separation. Current spec will cause cards to visually merge with backgrounds on certain displays.
objections.suggested_fix: Add border tokens for elevated surfaces: --border-elevated: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08) for dark theme, --border-elevated: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.04) for light theme. Document that elevation-2+ surfaces must include this border.

objections.description: No semantic color tokens for interactive states beyond hover/active. Missing: --color-surface-selected, --color-surface-pressed, --color-text-link, --color-text-link-hover. Premium UX requires these distinctions.
objections.suggested_fix: Add interactive state tokens: --color-surface-selected (accent-muted variant), --color-surface-pressed (surface-active), --color-text-link (accent), --color-text-link-hover (accent-hover). Document usage in component guidelines.

suggestions.description: Add --space-9 (2.25rem/36px) to the spacing scale for denser layouts between --space-8 and --space-10. Current gap creates awkward jumps for card padding variations.
Add --text-2xs (0.625rem/10px) with --leading-2xs (0.875rem) for legal text, timestamps, and metadata that needs to be compact but readable. Flighty uses this pattern extensively.
Add --radius-2xl (32px) for large modal/dialog containers. Current --radius-xl (24px) is insufficient for 768px+ breakpoint modals following premium aesthetic.
Document animation naming convention: [action]-[direction]-[duration] (e.g., fade-in-fast, slide-up-normal). Include BEM-style modifier classes for staggered animations.
